commentary_text: The model favors Australia at 35%, while sportsbooks heavily favor the USA at 54%, a 20-point gap on the USA win outcome. This reversal of favorites suggests the market is pricing in information unavailable to the statistical model—possibly recent lineup changes, injury developments, or current form that shifted the balance toward the United States. The model sees this as nearly a three-way toss-up; the market views it as a clear USA advantage. The dashboard surfaces this split as a significant signal worth monitoring, without adjudicating which assessment better reflects reality.
